observations: The game remains a monolithic JavaScript application with layered historical patches in game.js.
Career already contains Living Careers, rankings, one World Championship and CPU simulation foundations.
Battle Royal already uses a standalone dedicated match engine.
No aging or retirement system was added.
The current roster remains unchanged; the final four launch wrestlers are not created in this build.

implemented: Specialty Matches menu with no future placeholders
Playable standalone Last Man Standing match
40-card shared deck with four copies of 1-10
Automatic reshuffle when ten cards remain
Last Man Standing history and wrestler records
Career exclusion until standalone testing is complete
Version 9 feature flags for living universe, no aging and no retirement
deferred: Career integration of Last Man Standing
Full commentary-memory expansion across every existing mode
